    INSTALL EYETHU RADIO
    Install as a standalone app — works offline, launches from your desktop or home screen
    ⚙ Broadcast DSP Chain
    ● FM PROCESSOR — ALWAYS ON
    HPF35 Hz, −12 dB/oct
    LEVELER−30 dB / 1.6:1 slow AGC
    COMPRESSOR−16 dB / 3.5:1 fast
    BASS EQ90 Hz lowshelf +4 dB
    PRESENCE3 kHz peaking +3 dB
    AIR9 kHz highshelf +3 dB
    EXCITERtanh × 0.03 harmonic
    SOFT CLIPtanh(2x) 4× oversample
    LIMITER−0.5 dB / 25:1 brick wall
    OUTPUT0.95 constant trim
    Mic DSP Chain
    HPF80 Hz (−rumble)
    COMPRESSOR−20 dB / 3:1
    WARMTH180 Hz lowshelf +2 dB
    PRESENCE3 kHz peaking +2 dB

    Adjust live — changes take effect immediately
